description: The `FilterKeys` DSC resource is used to manage the Windows Filter Keys accessibility feature.
author: Microsoft Corporation

embedded.description: The `FilterKeys` DSC resource is used to manage the Windows Filter Keys accessibility feature.

SID.title: SID
SID.description: The security identifier. This is a key property and should not be set manually.

Active.title: Active
Active.description: Specifies whether Filter Keys is currently active.

Available.title: Available
Available.description: Specifies whether Filter Keys is available to be toggled.

HotkeyActive.title: HotkeyActive
HotkeyActive.description: Specifies whether the Filter Keys keyboard shortcut (holding Right Shift for 8 seconds) is active.

ConfirmOnHotkeyActivation.title: ConfirmOnHotkeyActivation
ConfirmOnHotkeyActivation.description: Specifies whether a confirmation dialog is shown when Filter Keys is activated via hotkey.

HotkeySound.title: HotkeySound
HotkeySound.description: Specifies whether a sound plays when Filter Keys hotkey is used.

VisualIndicator.title: VisualIndicator
VisualIndicator.description: Specifies whether a visual indicator is shown when Filter Keys is active.

AudibleFeedback.title: AudibleFeedback
AudibleFeedback.description: Specifies whether an audible tone plays when a key is pressed or accepted.

embedded.title: Microsoft.Windows.Setting.Accessibility/FilterKeys
